name: TWRP can't decrypt data in work profile on Pixel 3.
snippet: 13 Apr 2019 — I have created a work profile and enabled FBE . After entering the password in TWRP , only the main user's data is decrypted .

name: Decrypting FBE from TWRP : r/LineageOS - Reddit
snippet: FBE only encrypts files and directories which leads to a faster boot time and it actually decrypts them when unlocking the device after it boots up.
